We are now entering the Sprint 3 refinement and intelligence phase.

The current system foundation is solid, but several critical features are still incomplete or only partially implemented.

Focus ONLY on the following improvements in this phase.

PRIORITY 1 — Upload Intelligence

* Implement automatic metadata extraction during upload
* Parse filenames intelligently
* Extract available EXIF/document metadata
* Prefill metadata forms automatically
* Add auto-generated tags where possible
* Create confidence-based suggestions users can edit before save

PRIORITY 2 — Advanced Asset Table UX
Improve the asset listing experience:

* Multi-select rows
* Bulk actions (delete, tag, category assign)
* Persistent sorting/filtering
* Better pagination UX
* Column visibility controls
* Sticky filters/search bar

PRIORITY 3 — Dashboard Intelligence
Replace static dashboard cards with useful operational insights:

* Recent uploads
* Asset growth trends
* Most used categories
* Recently modified assets
* Duplicate asset warnings
* Storage usage overview

PRIORITY 4 — Visual Polish
Improve overall SaaS-level polish:

* Better spacing consistency
* Skeleton loaders
* Empty states
* Improved hover/focus states
* Better typography hierarchy
* Smooth transitions/animations
* More polished cards/tables/forms

PRIORITY 5 — Activity & Audit Foundation
Implement basic activity tracking:

* Asset created
* Asset updated
* Asset deleted
* Metadata changed
* Upload events

Add a simple activity feed UI.

IMPORTANT RULES

* Do NOT introduce major architectural rewrites
* Do NOT break existing Sprint 2 flows
* Preserve all current working functionality
* Keep components modular and reusable
* Maintain regression safety
* Focus on refinement and completion over expansion

Before implementing:

1. Audit current components/services
2. Reuse existing patterns
3. Identify partially implemented systems
4. Extend existing functionality instead of rebuilding

Goal:
Transform the current MVP into a polished, intelligent, production-ready asset management platform foundation.
